spec.objective: Author internal/subagent/codex/pricing_test.go: exhaustive offline unit tests for the pricing table and estimatedCostCents covering per-model rate correctness for codex-1 (input, output, cacheRead), ceiling division on sub-cent amounts, unknown-model conservative fallback (non-zero, greater than or equal to any known-model cost), zero tokens returns zero cents, PricingOverrides merge (verify per-instance clone — package-level priceTable never mutated, T-14-02), CacheCreationTokens always 0 in cost sum (OpenAI cache-creation invariant), and conservative-tier identity (conservative tier equals the most-expensive known entry). No real OpenAI API calls; all offline. Mirrors the test structure and naming convention of internal/subagent/anthropic/pricing_test.go.
